name: Guanlan Skill Store
scope: Adds the Data Center supervisor, source ingestion, event normalization, integrity gate, FDE projection, hardware projection, and TAG-V3 taxonomy governance lanes; legacy Business Signals and judgment skills are isolated as compatibility or downstream applications.

upgrade_policy.patch: Fix dashboard display, metadata wording, examples, evals, or sync handling without changing governance flow.
upgrade_policy.minor: Add a new governed skill lane, new required metadata field, new audit gate, or new lifecycle state.
upgrade_policy.major: Change the Skill Store governance model, registry contract, or Daily Loop integration contract.
